code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a fluent single sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper: simple template map (subject omitted)
    tmpl = {
        "league": "plays in the {o} league",
        "manager": "is managed by {o}",
        "position": "holds the position of {o}",
        "ground": "has ground {o}",
        "birthDate": "was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": "was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": "was born in {o}",
        "club": "plays for {o}",
        "draftTeam": "was drafted by {o}",
        "height": "is {o} meters tall",
        "youthclub": "started at youth club {o}",
        "currentclub": "currently plays for {o}",
        "weight": "weighs {o}",
        "deathPlace": "died in {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": "started his active years in {o}",
        "currentteam": "currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": "made his debut with {o}",
        "draftPick": "was pick number {o}",
        "draftRound": "was selected in round {o}",
        "formerTeam": "formerly played for {o}",
        "playerNumber": "has player number {o}",
        "college": "attended {o}",
        "draftYear": "was drafted in {o}",
        "coach": "is coached by {o}",
        "owner": "is owned by {o}",
        "city": "is based in {o}",
        "leader": "is led by {o}",
        "anthem": "has anthem {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": "has language {o}",
        "generalManager": "has general manager {o}",
        "chairman": "has chairman {o}",
        "season": "participated in the {o} season",
        "currency": "has currency {o}",
        "demonym": "has demonym {o}",
        "officialLanguage": "has official language {o}",
        "stadium": "has stadium {o}",
        "universityTeam": "is the university team of {o}",
        "mostChampions": "has most championships {o}",
        "leaderTitle": "has leader title {o}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {o}",
        "country": "is in {o}",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset {o}",
        "timeZone": "has time zone {o}",
        "areaTotal": "has total area {o}",
        "foundingDate": "was founded on {o}",
    }

    # Group triples by subject
    subj_map: dict[str, list[Triple]] = {}
    for t in triples:
        subj_map.setdefault(t.subject, []).append(t)

    # Choose main subject – the subject of the first triple that is not a location (heuristic)
    main_subject = triples[0].subject
    for t in triples:
        if any(word in t.subject.lower() for word in ["city", "town", "province", "state", "country", "region", "airport", "stadium", "university"]):
            continue
        main_subject = t.subject
        break

    # Build helper map for place -> country (used for deathPlace etc.)
    place_country: dict[str, str] = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.predicate == "country":
            place_country[t.subject] = t.object

    # Build clauses for the main subject
    main_triples = subj_map.get(main_subject, [])
    # Collect special fields
    birth_place = None
    birth_year = None
    birth_date = None
    death_place = None
    weight_val = None
    other_clauses = []

    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate == "birthPlace":
            birth_place = t.object
        elif t.predicate == "birthYear":
            birth_year = t.object
        elif t.predicate == "birthDate":
            birth_date = t.object
        elif t.predicate == "deathPlace":
            death_place = t.object
        elif t.predicate == "weight":
            # clean weight value, keep number and unit if present
            w = t.object.replace("(kilograms)", "").replace("kilograms", "").strip()
            weight_val = w + " kilograms" if w and not w.lower().endswith("kg") else w
        else:
            if t.predicate in tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl[t.predicate].format(o=t.object)
                other_clauses.append(phrase)

    # Combine birth information
    if birth_date:
        other_clauses.insert(0, f"was born on {birth_date}")
    elif birth_place and birth_year:
        other_clauses.insert(0, f"was born in {birth_place} in {birth_year}")
    elif birth_place:
        other_clauses.insert(0, f"was born in {birth_place}")
    elif birth_year:
        other_clauses.insert(0, f"was born in {birth_year}")

    # Add weight if present
    if weight_val:
        other_clauses.insert(0, f"weighs {weight_val}")

    # Add death information with country if known
    if death_place:
        death_clause = f"died in {death_place}"
        if death_place in place_country:
            death_clause += f", {place_country[death_place]}"
        other_clauses.append(death_clause)

    # Build final sentence
    if not other_clauses:
        sentence = main_subject
    elif len(other_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = f"{main_subject} {other_clauses[0]}."
    else:
        first, *rest = other_clauses
        if len(rest) == 1:
            sentence = f"{main_subject} {first}, and {rest[0]}."
        else:
            middle = ", ".join(rest[:-1])
            sentence = f"{main_subject} {first}, {middle}, and {rest[-1]}."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
